improvement_hint: Content is JP/EN; localization_directive instructs translation but cluster items remain untranslated — consider pre-translating canonical notes for zh.
Query asks about May koyo (impossible) — add an out-of-season advisory (e.g. fresh-green / shinryoku) and surface high-elevation late-koyo (Daisetsuzan) or redirect.
Ise Jingu appears in top_canonical_heritage; advisory helpfully redirects. Consider boosting Ise Jingu to top and including Naiku/Geku breakdown directly.

Returns 5 Aso-area hotels including 日本秘湯を守る会 ryokan, Marriott Aso, Aso-no-Tsukasa Villa Park. Crater-view confirmation absent; agent should verify via individual websites.
Beppu Onsen returned as top wikidata match with Jigoku Meguri, Takegawara Onsen etc. Canonical_onsen_towns lists OTHER yukata towns but not Beppu itself — consider boosting Beppu to canonical block.

Kaiseki itself is not a MAFF GI item; response returns sake brands etc. Add canonical_kaiseki_restaurants curation block (Kichisen, Kikunoi, Hyotei) or note kaiseki is a culinary tradition not a designation.

No canonical late-koyo block fired; results are real municipal koyo pages from Nagano/Ehime/Aomori/Fukushima but no Kyushu late-koyo. Add canonical_late_november_koyo (Kansai/Kyushu lower-elevation) cluster.

Family-friendly canonical block fires perfectly: Asahiyama Zoo, North Safari Sapporo, Northern Horse Park, Shiroi Koibito Park all match contact-animal intent. spots=[] but cluster covers it. RULE E applies.

Arabic query but response in EN/JP. canonical_halal block has Naritaya Gion + Ayam-YA Kyoto + Osaka Namba Masjid — good Kyoto/Osaka coverage. Add Arabic localization directive (RULE D -1 on constraint_handling).
get_spots returns Beppu onsen spots but query is romantic/private-bath specific. Consider routing or co-surfacing get_hotels(Oita, hotel_type='onsen_ryokan') for booking-grade options.

Korean translation works (RULE D OK). But query is budget 1000-yen meals in Sapporo; GI items (Yubari melon, Tokachi dairy etc.) don't match. Add canonical_budget_food_markets (Nijo Market, Tanuki Koji ramen alley).
Gion Matsuri canonical entry with peak dates (Jul 17/24), Yamaboko UNESCO ICH inscription, and bunka_intangible record all present. Strong answer.
Koyasan shukubo association members returned with designation_jp/en — perfect for shojin-ryori + temple stay query. Strong.
not_found block correctly identifies fictional prefecture with kind='fictional_or_imaginary_place' and clear suggestion. Excellent constraint handling.
Kyoto landmarks returned but no canonical_film_location / NHK Taiga set cluster. Add Toei Uzumasa, Daikaku-ji, Nijo Castle, Kiyomizu as taiga drama spots.
Nagano kogen family canonical block likely fires (Karuizawa, Utsukushigahara etc.). Confirm stroller-OK metadata in items.
Korean localization_directive + key_vocabulary fires. Kansai sakura cluster has Kodaiji night illumination (couple-targeted). Could add Maruyama Park night sakura + Philosopher's Path.
canonical_anime_pilgrimage block includes Your Name with Hida-Furukawa Station + Kida Wakamiya Shrine. RULE E applies.
Kumejima Tsumugi appears as METI densan craft 0126 with description. Workshop visit info missing — could add craft_workshop_url field linking to local 工房.
Query asks specifically Ureshino Onsen but returns Imari/Saga-Yamato/Wataya Besso/Takeo. Wataya Besso is in Ureshino. Add canonical_silk_onsen / Ureshino cluster (Wataya Besso, Hashizuya, Daishoya).

Returns Kyoto landmarks (Nijo Castle indoor-capable mixed) but no dedicated rainy-day/indoor cluster. Add canonical_rainy_day_kyoto (Kyoto Railway Museum, Manga Museum, Nishijin Textile Center, Kyoto National Museum).

Query is yatai (street stalls) under 500 yen — response returns MAFF GI tea/fugu/chicken brand items + city tourism pages, not Nakasu yatai. Add canonical_fukuoka_yatai (Nakasu yatai street, Tenjin yatai) cluster with price ranges.
Returns 15 Ehime mikan-related items from iyokannet. Could surface MAFF GI items for citrus varieties (iyokan, kanpei, beni-madonna) more directly with cultivar metadata block.
